title: ProductOS V10 — Team Capacity Model Q2 2026

trade_off_scenarios.name: Accelerate Marketing Content
trade_off_scenarios.scope_adjustment: Bring Sprint 16-17 marketing work forward. Add 21 story points.
trade_off_scenarios.result: Total demand reaches 110 points — still within capacity (336). Must-now priority increases to 76 points.

recommendations: Team is significantly under capacity (247 point surplus over 8 sprints). Consider: 1) Acceleration of Sprint 16-17 marketing content to fill capacity gap. 2) Increase prototype polish budget from 34 to 55 points for higher fidelity. 3) Assign 1 engineer to parallel track: living system auto-refresh infrastructure.
